name: verification-workflow
description: Post-deployment verification workflow running comprehensive health checks on the live production site

steps.name: Verify Infrastructure
steps.description: Check GitHub repo exists, Vercel project exists, deployment READY + PROMOTED

steps.name: Verify Network Layer
steps.description: Check DNS resolution, HTTPS certificates, no 525 SSL errors on both domains

steps.name: Verify Content Delivery
steps.description: Check homepage >5KB, dashboard accessible, no 404/500 errors on key routes

steps.name: Verify Authentication
steps.description: Check login form accessible, admin account exists, POST /api/auth/login succeeds

steps.name: Verify SEO & Standards
steps.description: Check robots.txt, sitemap.xml, meta tags present on homepage

steps.name: Aggregate Verification Results
steps.description: Combine all check results into final verification verdict (PASS/FAIL/WARN)
